spec_match.rationale: Perfect validation comparing native camera track settings (track.getSettings().frameRate) against totalFrames inside real-time interval loops.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive overlay. Binds webcams, renders an absolute dark-hud diagnostic deck directly on top of the video stream, and calculates ratios dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect mapping of the Google Meet motivated video pipeline diagnostics overlay concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Catches browser support exceptions and safely cancels readers on stop.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Superb black card overlays using standard border guidelines.

summary: The diagnostic-overlay is an exceptional, production-grade HUD widget illustrating the difference between declared camera speeds and actually delivered stream speeds.
